summary: Start branch cleanup policy upgrade and automation script

details.tier_reason: Touches authority document docs/operations/git-branch-policy.md and adds new automation script scripts/clean-merged-task-branches.mjs; affects multiple files but no product runtime behavior.
details.reason_for_task: User identified that the existing git-branch-policy.md Post-merge Branch Cleanup section relies on git branch --merged main, which is incorrect for our squash-merge workflow because squash commits are not ancestors of the source task branch. Five orphan branches accumulated as a result. The fix is to use git diff main..<branch> --quiet (tree equivalence) instead.
context_carryover: Five orphan branches: task/TASK-20260427-092, task/TASK-20260428-001, task/TASK-20260428-002, task/TASK-20260428-004, task/TASK-20260428-005
All five verified to have matching task_id squash commits in main (manual check before this Task).

next_action: Create branch, update policy, write script, run dry-run, then actual cleanup.

summary: Updated git-branch-policy v1.8, added clean-merged-task-branches.mjs, cleaned 4 orphan branches

policy_changes.key_change: Replaced --merged ancestor check with squash tree equivalence (branch tip tree == first [TASK-ID] commit on target tree)

kept.detail: branch tip is a post-merge correction commit; tree differs from main first squash commit 2b907f82

algorithm_iterations: 1) Plain git diff main..branch --quiet (false positive once main moves on)
2) git cherry -v main branch (only matches when single-commit branches happen to align)

next_action: Run audits, append VALIDATION_RESULT, write report, append TASK_COMPLETED.
